utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, bedrooms, square footage, price, neighborhood) — fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, interest rate, term, monthly payment, pre-approval validity) — fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (firm, cost, services list) — fully specified; includes contract review, title search, closing docs. The user task also mentions property surveys; not required by the format, so not mandatory for completeness. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (company, cost, services list) — fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (utility_connection_cost and services list) — fully specified. 
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property price, down payment, closing costs, additional services, total) — fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are fully specified.
